Study Guide

Use this page to organize the materials and expectations for your upcoming exam or assessment. Usually Midterm and Final exams. You can customize the sections and content as needed.

How to use in Brightspace

  1. Go to Content in your course
  2. Select Create New → HTML Document
  3. Open Source (</>)
  4. Copy the HTML below and paste it

Preview

Study Guide

Use this page to organize the materials and expectations for your upcoming exam or assessment.

View your study guide in a different browser: Open in a new tab

Go over the following materials in your textbook:

  • Chapter 1: [topic or page range]
  • Chapter 2: [topic or page range]
  • Chapter 3: [topic or page range]

Review from homeworks, quizzes, exams:

Homework Quiz Exam
Homework 1 Quiz 1 Exam 1 Review
Homework 2 Quiz 2 Practice Problems
Homework 3 Quiz 3 Sample Questions

Plan of Action

Exam Starts: [time]

Paper or Online: [paper/online]

Respondus LockDown Browser: [Enabled/Disabled]

→ Screen Recording? Yes / No

→ Webcam? Yes / No

→ iPad usage? Yes / No

What is allowed

  • [Allowed item 1]
  • [Allowed item 2]
  • [Allowed item 3]

What is not allowed

  • [Not allowed item 1]
  • [Not allowed item 2]
  • [Not allowed item 3]

Note: Respondus recordings can be seen and reviewed by instructors at any time. Once a ban is issued, you cannot be unbanned.

If issues persist on Respondus LockDown Browser, contact your instructor first, then COLTT.

Copy HTML

Copy everything below:




<section aria-label="Study Guide"
  style="max-width:950px;margin:0 auto;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#313131;line-height:1.5;">

  <div style="border:1px solid #d9d9d9;border-radius:16px;padding:18px;background:#ffffff;">

    
    <header style="border-left:8px solid #cb4900;background:#f7f7f7;padding:14px 16px;border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:16px;">
      <h2 style="margin:0 0 4px 0;font-size:1.35rem;color:#313131;">Study Guide</h2>
      <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;">
        Use this page to organize the materials and expectations for your upcoming exam or assessment.
      </p>
    </header>

    
    <section style="margin-bottom:18px;">
      <p style="margin:0;">
        <strong>View your study guide in a different browser:</strong>
        <a href="PASTE-LINK-HERE" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
          Open in a new tab
        </a>
      </p>
    </section>

    
    <section style="margin-bottom:18px;">
      <h3 style="margin:0 0 8px 0;color:#313131;">Go over the following materials in your textbook:</h3>
      <div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:12px;padding:14px;background:#fafafa;">
        <ul style="margin:0;padding-left:20px;color:#4c4a4f;">
          <li>Chapter 1: [topic or page range]</li>
          <li>Chapter 2: [topic or page range]</li>
          <li>Chapter 3: [topic or page range]</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </section>

    
    <section style="margin-bottom:18px;">
      <h3 style="margin:0 0 8px 0;color:#313131;">Review from homeworks, quizzes, exams:</h3>
      <div style="overflow:auto;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:12px;background:#ffffff;">
        <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;min-width:600px;">
          <thead>
            <tr style="background:#f7f7f7;text-align:left;color:#313131;">
              <th style="padding:12px;border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb;">Homework</th>
              <th style="padding:12px;border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb;">Quiz</th>
              <th style="padding:12px;border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb;">Exam</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr>
              <td style="padding:12px;border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb;">Homework 1</td>
              <td style="padding:12px;border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb;">Quiz 1</td>
              <td style="padding:12px;border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb;">Exam 1 Review</td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
              <td style="padding:12px;border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb;">Homework 2</td>
              <td style="padding:12px;border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb;">Quiz 2</td>
              <td style="padding:12px;border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb;">Practice Problems</td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
              <td style="padding:12px;">Homework 3</td>
              <td style="padding:12px;">Quiz 3</td>
              <td style="padding:12px;">Sample Questions</td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </section>

    
    <section style="margin-bottom:18px;">
      <h2 style="margin:0 0 10px 0;font-size:1.25rem;color:#313131;">Plan of Action</h2>

      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(250px,1fr));gap:12px;">

        <div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:12px;padding:14px;background:#fafafa;">
          <p style="margin:0 0 8px 0;"><strong>Exam Starts:</strong> [time]</p>
          <p style="margin:0;"><strong>Paper or Online:</strong> [paper/online]</p>
        </div>

        <div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:12px;padding:14px;background:#fafafa;">
          <p style="margin:0 0 8px 0;"><strong>Respondus LockDown Browser:</strong> [Enabled/Disabled]</p>
          <p style="margin:0 0 4px 0;">→ <strong>Screen Recording?</strong> Yes / No</p>
          <p style="margin:0 0 4px 0;">→ <strong>Webcam?</strong> Yes / No</p>
          <p style="margin:0;">→ <strong>iPad usage?</strong> Yes / No</p>
        </div>

      </div>
    </section>

    
    <section style="margin-bottom:18px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:12px;">

      <div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:12px;padding:14px;background:#ffffff;">
        <h3 style="margin:0 0 8px 0;color:#313131;">What is allowed</h3>
        <ul style="margin:0;padding-left:20px;color:#4c4a4f;">
          <li>[Allowed item 1]</li>
          <li>[Allowed item 2]</li>
          <li>[Allowed item 3]</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:12px;padding:14px;background:#ffffff;">
        <h3 style="margin:0 0 8px 0;color:#313131;">What is not allowed</h3>
        <ul style="margin:0;padding-left:20px;color:#4c4a4f;">
          <li>[Not allowed item 1]</li>
          <li>[Not allowed item 2]</li>
          <li>[Not allowed item 3]</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

    </section>

    
    <section style="margin-bottom:18px;">
      <div style="border-left:6px solid #4c4a4f;background:#f5f5f5;padding:14px 16px;border-radius:12px;">
        <p style="margin:0;color:#313131;">
          <strong>Note:</strong> Respondus recordings can be seen and reviewed by instructors at any time.
          Once a ban is issued, you cannot be unbanned.
        </p>
      </div>
    </section>

    
    <footer style="border-top:1px solid #e5e7eb;padding-top:12px;">
      <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.9rem;">
        If issues persist on Respondus LockDown Browser, contact your instructor first, then COLTT.
      </p>
    </footer>

  </div>
</section>

← Back to catalog
